case_title: GONZALEZ, JAVIER R. VS EL SINEITTI, JOSEPH et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, JAVIER R. AS TO DEFENDANT EL SINEITTI, JOSEPH UNION 76 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-2003 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EL SINEITTI, JOSEPH
MO.FOR RECONSIDERATION"DENIED":MOVING PARTY HAS OF FERED NO NEW OR DIFF.FACTS,CIRCUMSTANCES OR LAW AS REQ'D BYCCP1008;ALSO UNTIMELY(MAILED TO ALL PARTIE
RESPONSE FROM DEFENDANT FILED(RE-MOTION FOR RECONS IDERATION), LETTER PUT ON THE FILE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, JAVIER R. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EL SINEITTI, JOSEPH UNION 76 DEFENDANT UNION 76 NOT SERVED - DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF;PAID $15.40 CASH;TOLD TO WAIT AT LEAST 21 DAYS;MAILED COPIES TO OTHER PARTY;TO FOLDER,GIVEN TO SUP.
